title: WatchedItems
description: A user's watched products with an observed-price baseline, current tracked price, drop threshold, and optional budget/goal linkage. Provided by Module 6 (Shopping) to Tasks, Pay, and Inbox. Prices are integer CAD cents; tracked prices carry a FreshnessStamp (stale ⇒ NOT treated as a live drop, Constitution VIII). Email-inferred items are provenance-tracked so the FR-X-013 email-revocation purge can target them. Recommend-only: a watch never triggers a purchase.

profile_id.description: Owning profile; every cross-member read is authZ-checked server-side against the requester's session identity (threat model IDOR).

product_label_en.description: Localized product label; a label present in only one language is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

current_price.description: Latest tracked price in integer CAD cents (foreign prices FX-converted, half-up at the final cent, before storage).

baseline_price.description: Observed-history baseline (rolling median/trough over the tracked window) used for drop detection; NOT a single feed snapshot (defeats fake-anchor discounts, Clarification Q2).

drop_threshold_cents.description: User target price in cents below which a drop alert fires; null ⇒ a default percentage below baseline is used.

iso_currency.description: Original listing currency; non-CAD prices are FX-converted to CAD before display.

fx_rate.description: Decimal-string FX rate used when iso_currency != CAD; null for CAD. Stale FX flags the converted figure (Constitution VIII).

linked_budget_category.description: Canonical BudgetState category key this item is framed against; bilingual label resolved at the edge.

linked_goal_id.description: Optional GoalState goal_id for time-to-goal framing; null ⇒ time-to-goal line omitted (never shown as 'no goal').

source.description: Provenance. email_inferred entries are subject to the FR-X-013 email-revocation purge.

email_sourced.description: true iff this entry's SOLE source was a connected email; purged within 7 days of email-access revocation regardless of store (FR-X-013).

freshness.description: Freshness of current_price. Stale ⇒ price shown with a Stale chip and NOT alerted on as a live drop.
